measures.description: No unit label - As-Is numeric value

widgets.description: Displays AIS targets with range rings, interactive target details, and quick zoom and filtering controls.
widgets.name: AIS Radar

widgets.description: Monitors your anchor position and triggers an alarm if you drift outside a configured radius (anchor drag). Set the anchor point, watch radius, and alarm behavior (sound/notification) in the widget config. Requires internet connectivity to view map.
widgets.name: Anchor Watch

widgets.description: Provides typical autopilot controls for Signal K v1 & v2 Autopilot API devices. Requires a compatible hardware-specific Autopilot plugin for full functionality.
widgets.name: Autopilot Head

widgets.description: Displays battery banks and individual batteries with aggregated bank totals plus per-battery detail cards. See key BMS values such as state of charge, current, voltage, power, temperature, capacity, and time remaining for a clearer view of overall bank health and individual battery status.
widgets.name: Battery Monitor

widgets.description: A Digital Switching panel group with multiple controls including toggle switches, indicator lights, and press buttons to send Signal K paths values and other operations.
widgets.name: Switch Panel

widgets.description: Track charger output and charging state with voltage, current, power, and temperature monitoring, including real-time charging stage indicators.
widgets.name: AC/DC Charger

widgets.description: Visualizes data on a real-time chart with multiple preconfigured series including actuals, SMA and period overall averages and Min/Max. Requires the KIP Dataset to be configured.
widgets.name: Realtime Data Chart

widgets.description: Displays date and time data with fully custom formatting options and timezone correction.
widgets.name: Date & Time

widgets.description: Adds the Freeboard-SK chart plotter as a widget with automatic sign-in to your dashboard.
widgets.name: Freeboard-SK

widgets.description: A faceplate or card-style rotating compass gauge with multiple cardinal point indicator options.
widgets.name: Compass

widgets.description: A horizontal or vertical linear gauge that supports zone highlighting.
widgets.name: Linear

widgets.description: A radial gauge with configurable capacity and measurement dials plus zone highlighting.
widgets.name: Radial

widgets.description: A traditional steel looking linear & radial gauges replica that supports range sizes and zones highlights.
widgets.name: Classic Steel

widgets.description: Dual-scale heel angle indicator combining a high‑precision ±5° fine level with a wide ±40° coarse arc for fast trim tuning and broader heel / sea‑state monitoring.
widgets.name: Level Gauge

widgets.description: Horizon-style attitude indicator showing live pitch and roll degrees with smooth animation—ideal for monitoring trim, heel, and sea-state response.
widgets.name: Pitch & Roll

widgets.description: Embeds external web-based applications—such as Grafana graphs or other Signal K apps—into your dashboard for seamless integration. Interaction is disabled by default but can be enabled.
widgets.name: Embed Webpage Viewer

widgets.description: A static text widget that allows you to add customizable labels to your dashboard, helping to organize and clarify your layout effectively.
widgets.name: Static Label

widgets.description: Lists all available device/path operating modes/states (e.g., On, Off, Charge Only, Invert Only), highlights the current state, and lets you select a new state to send to the device and see the result.
widgets.name: Multi-State Switch

widgets.description: Displays numeric data in a clear and concise format, with options to show minimum and/or maximum recorded values. Includes an optional background minichart for quick visual trend insights.
widgets.name: Numeric

widgets.description: Displays latitude and longitude for location tracking and navigation.
widgets.name: Position

lineBiasPath.description: Bias of the start line to starboard end

ttbPath.description: Time to delay before sailing to the start line in seconds

ttlPath.description: Time to sail to the start line in seconds

widgets.description: Gain a tactical advantage for racing starts: set and adjust the port and starboard ends of the start line, see your distance to the line, the favored end, and how much the line is favored or unfavored. Includes visual integration with Freeboard SK for interactive line adjustment and display.
widgets.name: Racer - Start Line Insight

pathSlots.description: Bias of the start line to starboard end
Time to sail to the start line in seconds
Time to delay before sailing to the start line in seconds

dtsPath.description: Distance to Start Line path, used to determine OCS

ttsPath.description: Time to the Start in seconds

widgets.description: An advanced racing countdown timer that indicates OCS (On Course Side) status. Set the start line, choose or adjust the duration, or specify the exact start time. Automatically switches to the target dashboard at the start unless over early.
widgets.name: Racer - Start Timer

pathSlots.description: Time to the Start in seconds
Distance to Start Line path, used to determine OCS

widgets.description: A dynamic race steering display that fuses polar performance data with live conditions to guide optimal steering, tacking, and gybing angles for maximum speed. Instantly compare performance against competition polars for smarter tactical decisions.
widgets.name: Racesteer (BETA)

widgets.description: A simple race start countdown timer that can be started, paused, synced, reset, and configured for duration.
widgets.name: Countdown Timer

widgets.description: A simple horizontal linear gauge with a large value label offering a clean, compact modern look.
widgets.name: Compact Linear

gaugePath.description: PUT Supported Numeric Path. IMPORTANT: Format must be set to (base)

widgets.description: A Digital Switching range slider that allows users to adjust values, such as controlling lighting intensity or audio volume from 0% to 100%.
widgets.name: Slider

pathSlots.description: PUT Supported Numeric Path. IMPORTANT: Format must be set to (base)

widgets.description: Track solar generation and charging performance at a glance with live panel output, battery-side metrics, and clear charger and relay status indicators.
widgets.name: Solar Charger

widgets.description: Displays text data with a customizable color formatting option.
widgets.name: Text

widgets.description: An instructional widget that guides new users through basic navigation, gestures, and dashboard editing steps.
widgets.name: Tutorial

widgets.description: A wind steering display that combines wind, wind sectors, heading, course over ground and next waypoint information.
widgets.name: Windsteer

widgets.description: A real-time wind trends graph with dual axes for direction and speed. Displays live values and simple moving averages over the current period’s average.
widgets.name: Wind Trends

widgets.description: Displays the data state (severity and message) of the path's Zones (based on Signal K path metadata configuration).
widgets.name: Zones State Panel
